01-basic-input.title: Basic Input
01-basic-input.description: A simple text input field with default styling. Use this as the standard input element for collecting user text input.

02-validation.title: Validation States
02-validation.description: Input fields with error and success validation states, including helper text for user feedback.

03-sign-in.title: Sign In Form
03-sign-in.description: Email and password fields with a password visibility toggle — a common authentication pattern.

04-search.title: Search
04-search.description: Search input with a keyboard shortcut hint that switches to a clear action once the user types.

05-user-handle.title: User Handle
05-user-handle.description: Editable username field with an inline copy action.

06-api-key.title: API Key
06-api-key.description: Read-only secret field with reveal and copy actions — suitable for credentials and tokens.

07-url-validation.title: URL with Validation
07-url-validation.description: URL field that shows a success or error icon in the suffix slot based on the input value.

08-quantity.title: Quantity
08-quantity.description: Number input with native spin controls for selecting a bounded quantity.
